skills.name: devo-infra
skills.description: Devo platform infrastructure — 6 environments (EU/US/US3/AP/Santander/GCP-TEF). Ansible roles detail: datanode, alcohol, batrasio, malote/metamalote, mason, asilo, pilot, chasys, barcenas, licor, dailytasks, myapp-loader, casperable-updater, resilient-infra, logtrust.base. Service ports, JVM/Node config, systemd units, config paths. Kubernetes EKS (4 AWS accounts, 19 clusters). Customer affinity/delegation, S3 buckets, key paths, full playbook reference.
